description: You are the Lead Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A junior site coordinator accidentally removed some valid clinical records from the database. Use the OpenClinica web interface (Credentials: root / Admin123!) to restore the removed subject record for DM-106 and the removed 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject DM-102 to the 'Available' state.
